nasb.text: Then I will punish their transgression with the rod And their iniquity with stripes.

esv.text: then I will punish their transgression with the rod and their iniquity with stripes,

cnv.text: 我就用杖責罰他們的過犯， 用鞭責罰他們的罪孽。

ccb.text: 我就会因他们的罪用杖惩罚他们， 用鞭子责打他们。

csbs.text: 我就要用杖惩罚他们的过犯， 用鞭惩罚他们的罪孽。
